zh.Aldingham, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Darcy於1221年出生在英國爾希布盧可時，他的父親Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton30歲，母親Agnes28歲。他和Joan Garnett至少有1個女兒。他去世於1318年8月24日在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Darcy于1221年出生在英国爾希布盧可时，他的父亲Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton30岁，母亲Agnes28岁。他和Joan Garnett至少有1个女儿。他去世于1318年8月24日在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Darcy was born in 1221, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, his father, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, was 30 and his mother, Agnes, was 28. He had at least 1 daughter with Joan Garnett. He died on 24 August 1318, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Darcy est né en 1221, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Joan Garnett. Il est décédé le 24 août 1318, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Darcy 1221 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton 30 und seine Mutter Agnes 28. Er hatte mit Joan Garnett mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. August 1318 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Darcy è nato il nel 1221 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Joan Garnett. Morì il 24 agosto 1318, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Darcyが1221年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Norman Darcy Lord of Noctonは30歳，母Agnesは28歳であった。彼はJoan Garnettとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1318年8月24日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Darcy(이)가 1221년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Joan Garnett(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 8월 24일 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Darcy nasceu em 1221, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Joan Garnett. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1318, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Darcy родился в 1221 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 28. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Joan Garnett. Он умер 24 августа 1318 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Darcy nació en 1221, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Joan Garnett. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1318, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 97 años.
